pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Magnetar is a plugin and mod loader for the Space Engineers Dedicated Server (SE1) - a hard fork of Pulsar adapted to run the headless dedicated server natively on Linux on .NET 10 via se-dotnet-compat and se-linux-compat. It is the server-side companion to Pulsar (the client/game launcher).
This ebuild is a binary repack of the official MagnetarForLinux .7z release published on viktor-ferenczi/Magnetar. The launcher installs under /opt/magnetar with a /usr/bin/magnetar wrapper; run it in place of SpaceEngineersDedicated. Plugins are not packaged separately; Magnetar fetches them from PluginHub on first run.
